an7.37:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, one should associate with a bhikkhu friend who possesses seven qualities; one should resort to him and attend on him even if he dismisses you. What seven? (1) He is pleasing and agreeable; (2) he is respected and (3) esteemed; (4) he is a speaker;(5) he patiently endures being spoken to; (6) he gives deep talks; and (7) he does not enjoin one to do what is wrong."
an7.37:1.0.2: He is dear, respected, and esteemed,a speaker and one who endures speech;he gives deep talks and does not enjoin oneto do what is wrong.
an7.37:1.0.3: The person here in whomthese qualities are found is a friend,benevolent and compassionate.Even if one is dismissed by him,one desiring a friendshould resort to such a person.
